title: Fitness Influencers Linked to Illegal Online Steroid Trade
subtitle: New investigation reveals how wellness brands are being used to sell dangerous performance-enhancing drugs.

summary.en: A recent investigation has uncovered that fitness influencers are helping run an illegal steroid market on the messaging app Telegram. These individuals are associated with a wellness company that claims to promote health and fitness. Experts warn that the line between legitimate fitness advice and the sale of dangerous drugs is disappearing. Anabolic steroids and other experimental substances are being sold without medical oversight. The report highlights the serious health risks faced by those who use these substances to change their appearance.
summary.zh: 一項近期調查揭露，健身網紅正協助在通訊軟體 Telegram 上經營非法類固醇市場。這些人士與一家聲稱推廣健康與健身的健康公司有關。專家警告，合法健身建議與危險藥物販售之間的界線正在消失。合成代謝類固醇與其他實驗性物質在缺乏醫療監督的情況下被販售。該報導強調了那些為了改變外貌而使用這些物質的人所面臨的嚴重健康風險。

paragraphs.en: A new investigation by The Guardian has revealed a worrying connection between fitness influencers and an illegal market for performance-enhancing drugs. These influencers, who often represent a wellness brand called Gencore Global, are using the messaging app Telegram to sell anabolic steroids and other unregulated substances. This report follows earlier findings that identified a network of ambassadors and employees promoting these drugs to their thousands of followers on social media platforms like TikTok and Instagram.
paragraphs.zh: 《衛報》(The Guardian) 的一項最新調查揭露了健身網紅與非法增強體能藥物市場之間令人擔憂的關聯。這些網紅通常代表一家名為「健核全球」(Gencore Global) 的健康品牌，他們利用通訊軟體 Telegram 販售合成代謝類固醇及其他未受監管的物質。這份報導接續了先前的發現，該發現指出有一個由品牌大使與員工組成的網絡，正在 TikTok 與 Instagram 等社群媒體平台上，向數以千計的追隨者推銷這些藥物。

paragraphs.en: Gencore Global describes itself as a UK-based health company. It has appeared at major fitness events and sponsors various sports activities. On its official website, the company sells items such as skincare products and supplements. However, behind this professional image, the company’s ambassadors have been caught recruiting people into an underground Telegram group. This group, currently known as 'Anabolic By Nature,' acts as a marketplace for illegal drugs. When asked about the connection, one ambassador admitted that the group is a rebranded version of a previous illegal network that had been shut down.
paragraphs.zh: 健核全球自稱為一家總部位於英國的健康公司。該公司曾出席大型健身活動並贊助各類體育賽事。在其官方網站上，公司販售護膚產品與營養補充品等商品。然而，在專業形象的背後，該公司的品牌大使被發現正在招募人員加入一個地下的 Telegram 群組。這個目前被稱為「天生合成」(Anabolic By Nature) 的群組，實際上是一個非法藥物交易市場。當被問及兩者的關聯時，一名大使坦承，該群組是先前一個已被查封的非法網絡所改頭換面而成的。

paragraphs.en: Anabolic steroids are synthetic versions of testosterone, a male hormone. While they can help increase muscle size and speed up recovery after exercise, they come with severe health risks. According to medical experts, using these drugs without a doctor’s supervision can lead to heart disease, liver damage, and serious mood changes like aggression or depression. The Telegram network also sells other dangerous items, including prescription-only medicines and experimental substances known as peptides. These peptides are often sold with claims that they help with weight loss or injury recovery, even though there is very little scientific evidence to prove they are safe for humans.
paragraphs.zh: 合成代謝類固醇是男性荷爾蒙睪固酮的合成版本。雖然它們有助於增加肌肉量並加速運動後的恢復，但卻伴隨著嚴重的健康風險。根據醫學專家的說法，在沒有醫師監督的情況下使用這些藥物，可能導致心臟病、肝臟受損，以及出現攻擊性或憂鬱等嚴重的心理情緒變化。該 Telegram 網絡也販售其他危險品，包括處方藥以及被稱為「胜肽」(peptides) 的實驗性物質。這些胜肽在販售時常宣稱有助於減重或傷後復原，儘管目前幾乎沒有科學證據證明這些物質對人體是安全的。

paragraphs.en: In the United Kingdom, it is legal to own anabolic steroids for personal use, but it is against the law to sell or supply them without a proper license. Importing these drugs without permission is also illegal. Despite these laws, the Telegram marketplace continues to operate. In one message, an administrator of the group joked about the difficulty of running an illegal business, noting that users should not expect the website to be available at all times.
paragraphs.zh: 在英國，持有合成代謝類固醇供個人使用是合法的，但在沒有適當執照的情況下販售或供應則屬違法。未經許可進口這些藥物同樣違法。儘管有這些法律規範，該 Telegram 市場仍持續運作。在其中一則訊息中，該群組的一名管理員甚至開玩笑地提到經營非法生意的困難，並提醒使用者不要期待該網站能隨時保持連線。

paragraphs.en: The pressure to achieve a perfect body is a major factor driving this trade. Jamie Mantzouridis, a 29-year-old nutritionist and former bodybuilder, shared his personal experience with the dangers of these drugs. He started using steroids in his early 20s because he wanted to look like the larger men he saw at his gym. He soon discovered that the reality was far from the healthy image promoted online. He suffered from painful skin infections and even had to be hospitalized. He also experimented with insulin, a drug meant for people with diabetes, which can be life-threatening when used incorrectly by healthy individuals.
paragraphs.zh: 追求完美體態的壓力是推動這項交易的主要因素。二十九歲的營養師兼前健美選手傑米·曼佐里迪斯 (Jamie Mantzouridis) 分享了他個人對於這些藥物危險性的親身經歷。他在二十出頭時開始使用類固醇，因為他想讓自己看起來像健身房裡那些體格壯碩的男性。他很快發現，現實與網路上宣傳的健康形象相去甚遠。他飽受痛苦的皮膚感染之苦，甚至必須住院治療。他還曾嘗試使用胰島素，這原本是糖尿病患者使用的藥物，若健康的人錯誤使用，可能會危及生命。

paragraphs.en: Mantzouridis recalls the moment he decided to stop. He felt dizzy and realized he was close to collapsing. He believes that social media creates unrealistic expectations for men, pressuring them to look a certain way. 'Everyone believes they’re meant to look a certain way,' Mantzouridis said. He explains that this pressure makes it difficult for people to appreciate their own natural progress, leading them to take dangerous risks that they will regret later in life.
paragraphs.zh: 曼佐里迪斯回憶起他決定停止使用的那一刻。當時他感到頭暈，並意識到自己快要昏倒了。他認為社群媒體為男性創造了不切實際的期待，迫使他們必須呈現出某種特定的外貌。曼佐里迪斯說：「每個人都認為自己應該要長成某個樣子。」他解釋說，這種壓力讓大眾難以欣賞自己自然的進步，進而導致他們冒著會在未來人生中後悔的危險。

paragraphs.en: Experts are concerned that the influence of these fitness personalities is making it harder for young people to distinguish between healthy habits and dangerous drug use. By using their large followings to normalize the use of steroids and experimental peptides, these influencers are blurring the lines between legitimate wellness and illegal activity. As the investigation continues, the focus remains on how these brands use their public image to hide a dangerous underground trade. For many, the lesson from stories like that of Mantzouridis is clear: the short-term gains promised by these drugs are never worth the long-term damage to one's health.
paragraphs.zh: 專家擔憂，這些健身網紅的影響力正使得年輕人更難分辨健康習慣與危險藥物濫用之間的界線。這些網紅利用龐大的追隨者群體，將類固醇與實驗性胜肽的使用常態化，模糊了合法健康產業與非法活動之間的界線。隨著調查持續進行，焦點仍放在這些品牌如何利用公眾形象來掩蓋危險的地下交易。對許多人而言，像曼佐里迪斯這樣的故事所帶來的教訓很明確：這些藥物所承諾的短期成效，絕對不值得以長期的健康損害作為代價。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To happen after something else in time or as a result of it.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「跟隨」解釋，這裡指事件發生的先後順序。文中：This report follows earlier findings that identified a network of ambassadors and employees promoting these drugs to their thousands of followers on social media platforms like TikTok and Instagram.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The boundaries or distinctions between two different things.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「線條」或「排隊」，這裡指抽象的界線。文中：By using their large followings to normalize the use of steroids and experimental peptides, these influencers are blurring the lines between legitimate wellness and illegal activity.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Improvements or increases in something, often physical or financial.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（獲得），這裡作名詞，指健身帶來的短期效果。文中：For many, the lesson from stories like that of Mantzouridis is clear: the short-term gains promised by these drugs are never worth the long-term damage to one's health.

sources.title: Fitness influencers linked to wellness brand helping run illegal steroid market on Telegram

sources.title: ‘I felt dizzy’: bodybuilder recalls how drug abuse caught up with him

previousArticles.title: Fitness Influencers Linked to Illegal Steroid Market
previousArticles.summaryEn: A recent investigation has uncovered a connection between fitness influencers and an illegal online steroid market. These influencers, who represent a wellness brand, are using Telegram to sell drugs and recruit new members. Anabolic steroids are synthetic hormones that can cause serious health problems, including heart and liver damage. While some people use these substances to change their bodies quickly, experts warn that the risks are often ignored. The story highlights the growing pressure on social media to achieve a perfect body image.

quiz.question: According to the article, what is the primary function of the 'Anabolic By Nature' Telegram group?

options.A: To provide professional medical advice for bodybuilding.
options.B: To serve as a marketplace for selling illegal performance-enhancing substances.
options.C: To promote Gencore Global's legitimate skincare and supplement products.
options.D: To host a community for people to share their natural weight loss progress.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段，該 Telegram 群組被明確描述為「an underground marketplace for illegal drugs」（非法藥物的地下交易市場）。選項 A 錯誤，因為該群組並非提供醫療建議；選項 C 錯誤，因為該公司在公開網站販售保養品，但該群組是隱藏的非法交易平台；選項 D 錯誤，因為該群組的目的是銷售類固醇，而非分享自然健身進度。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about Gencore Global's business strategy?

options.A: They focus exclusively on selling illegal drugs to avoid detection.
options.B: They use a legitimate public image to hide their involvement in an illicit trade.
options.C: They are a small, unknown company with no presence at fitness events.
options.D: They operate entirely through official retail stores in the United Kingdom.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第二段與最後一段，Gencore Global 在公開場合展現出專業的形象（如參加健身活動、販售合法保養品），但背地裡卻透過大使招募人員進入非法群組。這顯示其策略是利用合法的公眾形象來掩蓋非法交易。選項 A 錯誤，因為他們同時販售合法產品；選項 C 與文章提到的「appeared at major fitness events」矛盾；選項 D 錯誤，因為他們主要透過 Telegram 進行非法銷售。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'normalizing' mean as it is used in the context of influencer behavior?

options.A: Making something harmful seem acceptable or standard.
options.B: Increasing the physical size of muscles through training.
options.C: Providing scientific evidence for a new medical discovery.
options.D: Reporting illegal activities to the proper authorities.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到網紅透過大眾影響力來「normalize」類固醇的使用，意指將原本危險、不正常的事物，透過頻繁展示使其看起來像是健身過程中的「常態」或「可接受的行為」。選項 B 與肌肉生長有關但非此詞含義；選項 C 與文章強調缺乏科學證據的事實相反；選項 D 與該詞意涵無關。

quiz.question: What is the central message of this article?

options.A: The UK government has successfully stopped the sale of all illegal steroids.
options.B: Fitness influencers are the only people responsible for the rise of obesity.
options.C: The use of insulin is the safest way for bodybuilders to recover from injuries.
options.D: Fitness influencers are exploiting social media pressure to sell dangerous, illegal substances under the guise of wellness.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。文章的主旨旨在揭露健身網紅如何利用大眾對完美體態的焦慮，將非法藥物包裝在健康形象下進行銷售，並強調這種行為的危險性。選項 A 與文章提到非法市場持續運作的事實不符；選項 B 過度誇大，文章並未說網紅是肥胖問題的唯一元兇；選項 C 明顯錯誤，文章明確指出錯誤使用胰島素會危及生命。
